'''dapugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hidrocystoma|hidrocystoma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hidrocystoma|hidrocystoma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dapugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæpigith|dæpigith]] || [[word:dæpigij|dæpigij]] || [[word:dæpigish|dæpigish]] || [[word:dæpigi|dæpigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dapupuguth|dapupuguth]] || [[word:dapupuguj|dapupuguj]] || [[word:dapupugush|dapupugush]] || [[word:dapupugu|dapupugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dapuguth|dapuguth]] || [[word:dapuguj|dapuguj]] || [[word:dapugush|dapugush]] || [[word:dapugu|dapugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dapufguth|dapufguth]] || [[word:dapufguj|dapufguj]] || [[word:dapufgush|dapufgush]] || [[word:dapufguf|dapufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dapuguthu|dapuguthu]] || [[word:dapuguju|dapuguju]] || [[word:dapugushu|dapugushu]] || [[word:dapuguku|dapuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dapuguth|dapuguth]] || [[word:dapuguj|dapuguj]] || [[word:dapugush|dapugush]] || [[word:dapugu|dapugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dapuguthul|dapuguthul]] || [[word:dapugujul|dapugujul]] || [[word:dapugushul|dapugushul]] || [[word:dapugukul|dapugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dapuguthuthu|dapuguthuthu]] || [[word:dapugujuju|dapugujuju]] || [[word:dapugushushu|dapugushushu]] || [[word:dapuguku|dapuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dapuguthun|dapuguthun]] || [[word:dapugujun|dapugujun]] || [[word:dapugushun|dapugushun]] || [[word:dapugukun|dapugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dapuguthuoro|dapuguthuoro]] || [[word:dapugujuoro|dapugujuoro]] || [[word:dapugushuoro|dapugushuoro]] || [[word:dapugukuoro|dapugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
